choose.otherwise: (b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board (title, content, member_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{memberId})
mapper.select: SELECT b.*, m.nickname AS member_nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.board_id = b.id) AS comment_count FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.member_id = m.id WHERE b.id = #{id}

SELECT b.*, m.nickname AS member_nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.board_id = b.id) AS comment_count FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.member_id = m.id
ORDER BY b.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.member_id = m.id

SELECT b.*, m.nickname AS member_nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.board_id = b.id) AS comment_count FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.member_id = m.id WHERE b.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY b.id DESC

SELECT b.*, m.nickname AS member_nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.board_id = b.id) AS comment_count FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.member_id = m.id WHERE b.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY b.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE board SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
